templates.name: view_speedscope_index
templates.arch:
<template>
        <!DOCTYPE html>
        <html lang="en">
            <head>
                <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
                <title>Speedscope for orbex</title>
                <script>window.location.hash="#localProfilePath=1"</script>
                <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Source+Code+Pro" rel="stylesheet"/>
                <link rel="stylesheet" t-attf-href="{{cdn}}reset.8c46b7a1.css" crossorigin="anonymous" integrity="sha256-mrA/937EwtEDE+8XZ/62tNz2T/BnCLth8QmWsWKpvD8="/>
            </head>
            <body>
                <script t-attf-src="{{cdn}}speedscope.026f36b0.js" crossorigin="anonymous" integrity="sha256-CvDqAOMjq0Sv/D59O5JSbzzXoClZ3rptt6ts8D/6CWw="/>
                <script>
                const b64 = '<t t-esc="speedscope_base64"/>';
                document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
                    speedscope.loadFileFromBase64('Profile', b64);
                });
                </script>
            </body>
        </html>
    </template>
